TestName: Validate BR-01 - Authentication and Access Control The system must ensure that only authorized users can access protected business functionalities.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate FR-01 - User Authentication
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-02 - Customer Management The system must provide the ability to manage customer information used in operational and financial processes.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-08 - Customer Record Completeness A customer record must contain all mandatory attributes required to identify and manage the customer in operational and financial processes.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-13 - Customer Requirement for Job Creation A job card must be linked to a valid customer.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-03 - Vendor Management The system must support the management of vendors who provide operational services.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-09 - Vendor Record Completeness A vendor record must include the minimum information required to identify the vendor and associate the vendor with supported services.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-42 - Vendor Consistency for Voucher Where the voucher is vendor-specific, the included payable items must align with the vendor associated with the voucher.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-04 - Event Management The system must allow the creation and management of events that group operational activities.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-10 - Event Date Consistency Where an event includes start and end dates, the end date must not occur before the start date.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-05 - Job Card Management The system must support the creation and lifecycle management of job cards representing operational work.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-07 - Cost Management The system must ensure accurate tracking and aggregation of costs associated with service items.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-06 - Operational Service Management The system must support recording and management of service items associated with job cards.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-08 - Batch Processing The system must group operational service items into batches for financial processing.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-37 - Batch Integrity All items included in a batch must remain valid and traceable to their source records.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-09 - Payment Voucher Management The system must support the creation and management of payment vouchers for vendor payments.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-10 - Invoice Management The system must support billing of customers through invoices.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate FR-19 - Void Invoice
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-44 - Invoice Source Validity An invoice must be created only from valid billable business content.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-45 - Invoice Amount Integrity Invoice totals must accurately reflect the chargeable content from the underlying operational and financial records.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-11 - Proforma Invoice Management The system must support preliminary billing through proforma invoices.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-48 - Proforma as Non-Final Billing A proforma invoice must be treated as a preliminary billing document and not as a finalized financial settlement record.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-49 - Proforma Conversion Control Where conversion from proforma invoice to final invoice is supported, the conversion must preserve business consistency and avoid duplicated billing.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-12 - Receipt Management The system must support recording of payments received from customers.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-52 - Receipt Amount Limit The cumulative total of receipts applied to an invoice must not exceed the allowed receivable amount for that invoice unless overpayment handling is explicitly supported.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-54 - Receipt Traceability A receipt must remain traceable to the invoice or financial document against which it was recorded.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-55 - Receipt Void Preservation Voiding a receipt must preserve transaction history and audit visibility.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BR-13 - Reporting and Analytics The system must provide reporting capabilities for operational and financial data.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-56 - Reporting Accuracy All reports must reflect the current valid state of the underlying business data according to the reporting context.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate FR-02 - Token Validation
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-06 - Token Validity The system must reject expired, malformed, tampered, or otherwise invalid authentication tokens.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-23 - Service Deletion Restriction A service item must not be removed if it has already been included in a finalized financial process unless the system supports controlled reversal procedures.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-01 - Mandatory Data Integrity All records created, updated, or processed by the system must preserve referential and transactional integrity across related business entities.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-24 - Mandatory Cost Value Every service item that contributes to business cost must contain a valid cost value.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-02 - Valid Entity Reference A transaction must not reference a customer, vendor, event, job card, batch, invoice, or other entity unless that entity already exists and is valid for use. Explanation: The system must verify the existence of referenced entities before
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-39 - Valid Batch Requirement for Voucher Creation A payment voucher must be linked to valid batch data or another valid source of payable operational items.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-51 - Valid Invoice Requirement for Receipt A receipt must be linked to a valid payable invoice or supported financial source.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-03 - Controlled Modification Records that have reached a finalized, closed, processed, or voided state must be subject to controlled modification rules.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-04 - Audit Preservation Where financial or operational actions have audit significance, the system must preserve transaction history and avoid destructive
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-05 - Authenticated Access Required All protected API operations must require successful authentication.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-07 - Identity Context Every authorized transaction must be processed within the context of the authenticated user identity.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-14 - Job Card Identity Each job card must have a unique identifier.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-11 - Protected Deletion of Master Data A customer, vendor, or event must not be deleted if it is actively referenced by downstream business transactions unless the system explicitly supports safe deactivation instead of deletion.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-12 - Active Usage Constraint Only active or valid master data records should be available for new downstream transactions.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-15 - Job Card Lifecycle Control A job card must operate within defined lifecycle states. Minimum Expected States • Open • Closed
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-17 - Closed Job Restriction A closed job card must not accept new operational service items or unrestricted modifications.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-18 - Job Closure Preconditions The system may require certain business conditions to be satisfied before a job card can be closed. Possible Conditions • Required operational data completed • Financial dependencies reviewed • No invalid incomplete service lines
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-19 - Deletion Restriction for Financially Used Jobs A job card must not be deleted if it has already contributed to invoices, batches, vouchers, receipts, or other financially significant downstream records.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-20 - Service-to-Job Relationship Every operational service item must belong to a valid job card.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-25 - Transportation Route Validity For transportation entries, pickup and drop-off information must be valid and meaningful.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-26 - Hotel Stay Validity For hotel entries, stay duration must be logically valid.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-28 - Miscellaneous Service Clarity Miscellaneous items must contain sufficient descriptive information to justify their existence and financial value. Validation Requirements •
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-29 - Non-Negative Cost Rule All cost-bearing service entries must have non-negative amounts.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-30 - Recalculation on Change The total cost of a job card must be recalculated whenever a cost-bearing service item is added, updated, or removed.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-31 - Aggregated Total Accuracy The total job cost must equal the sum of all valid included service item costs associated with that job.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-32 - Financial Consistency Operational totals used in downstream financial
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-33 - Invalid Numeric Rejection The system must reject invalid numeric values such as non-numeric costs, malformed decimals, or values outside supported limits.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-34 - Eligibility for Batching Only eligible operational items may be added to a batch. Typical Eligibility Conditions • Item exists • Item is valid • Item is not already processed in another conflicting financial workflow
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-35 - Single Batch Membership An item must not belong to multiple active or conflicting batches when the business process expects exclusive grouping.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-36 - Empty Batch Prevention The system must not create or persist a financial batch without at least one valid item.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-38 - Processed Batch Restriction Once a batch has been processed into downstream financial transactions, unrestricted editing or item replacement should not be allowed.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-40 - Voucher Amount Accuracy The value of a payment voucher must match the payable amount derived from the included operational items according to business rules.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-43 - Voucher Traceability A voucher must remain traceable to the items, batches, or services that generated the payable amount.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-41 - Duplicate Voucher Prevention The system must prevent duplicate or conflicting payment voucher creation for the same payable business content unless intentional partial or revised voucher behavior is explicitly supported.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-50 - Duplicate Billing Prevention The system must prevent double invoicing of the same billable content unless explicitly allowed by the business model.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-46 - Finalized Invoice Restriction Once finalized, an invoice must not be freely modified.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-47 - Voided Invoice Preservation Voiding an invoice must preserve the invoice record and its historical relationship rather than erase it.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-53 - Voided or Invalid Target Restriction The system must prevent receipt application to a voided, invalid, or otherwise non-receivable financial document unless business rules explicitly permit it.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-57 - Profit and Loss Consistency Profit and loss reporting must be based on accurate revenue and cost figures derived from valid business records.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-58 - Historical Integrity Historical reports must preserve prior business events and should not be distorted by destructive deletion of financially relevant records.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-59 - Uninvoiced Identification Uninvoiced reporting must correctly identify valid business content that has not yet been invoiced according to the billing rules.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-60 - Auditability of Financial Events Financially significant actions such as invoice creation, voiding, receipt recording, and voucher creation must remain auditable.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-61 - Clear Validation Feedback When a request fails validation, the system must provide a clear and meaningful error response identifying the reason for rejection.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-62 - Consistent Error Handling Validation failures, missing references, state violations, and unauthorized access must be handled consistently across modules.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-63 - Downstream Dependency Protection A record must not be changed in a way that invalidates already completed downstream
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior

TestName: Validate BRULE-64 - Operational-to-Financial Continuity Operational records and financial records must remain connected throughout the lifecycle of a business transaction.
Steps: Verify the response and business behavior
